basic_details.short_information: North Bengal Medical College & Hospital (NBMC&H) has officially announced the Senior Residence Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. The detailed notification has been published on its official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of below 45 years and hold an MBBS degree with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB qualification are eligible to apply for this post. The recruitment will be conducted through a walk-in interview scheduled on 15 July 2026. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in process directly with the required documents as mentioned in the official notification.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from recognized university Valid registration of WBMC/any State Council at the time of interview Registration for WBMC within 02 months of joining (if selected)

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview General emergency duty as per roster in addition to department work

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NBMC&H Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NBMC&H Senior Residence Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from recognized university Valid registration of WBMC/any State Council at the time of interview Registration for WBMC within 02 months of joining (if selected)

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NBMC&H Senior Residence Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Walk-in-interview General emergency duty as per roster in addition to department work

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NBMC&H Senior Residence Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NBMC&H Senior Residence Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NBMC&H Senior Residence?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Senior Residence post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from a recognized university to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Residence position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Residence post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Residence post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Residence post, specifically in the Orthopaedic department.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with their applications and documents.

faq.question: Q6. Which department has the vacancy for Senior Residence?
faq.answer: The vacancy for the Senior Residence post is in the Orthopaedic department.

faq.question: Q7. Do I need a valid registration to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have a valid registration with WBMC or any state council at the time of the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What happens if I am selected?
faq.answer: If selected, the candidate will be required to obtain registration for WBMC within 02 months of joining the post.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be provided for attending the interview?
faq.answer: No, the notification clearly states that no TA/DA will be paid to the candidates attending the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the North Bengal Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: North Bengal Medical College & Hospital is located in Darjeeling, West Bengal, with the pincode 734012.
